summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of jewelry demo website after FakeStore API migration. All core e-commerce functionality tested and working perfectly.
passed_tests: Home page loads with products from FakeStore API
Men's clothing category navigation and product loading
Women's clothing category navigation and product loading
Jewelry category navigation and product loading
Product detail page functionality and data display
Add to cart functionality with proper redirect
Cart page display and empty cart state
Header navigation links for all categories
